originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__k_crcs_1621' is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'k_crcs' is never read
model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
reasoning: k_crcs = someInt at L25 (inside if(r) block) is a dead store — k_crcs is never read after this assignment before the function exits via out:/return. Genuine dead store in the r=true path. No // ERROR at L25, new bug. PC = !_STDLIB_H AND !__need_malloc_and_calloc — only library macros (restrictive !_STDLIB_H). Bug fires in all compilable VERSION_CHECKING=T configs; PC is over-constrained because it only fires in non-standard stdlib header states.
